title: Define Python TUI UX and screen map
description: Why this exists: the TUI needs a concrete operator workflow before implementation so it does not become a bag of disconnected panels. What needs to be done: define the screen map, navigation keys, status bar fields, connection state model, inbox/thread layout, compose flow, node/status panels, mesh neighbor view, config editor boundaries, log viewer, diagnostics panel, and small-terminal behavior. Acceptance criteria: every MVP screen has purpose, visible fields, empty/error/loading states, and navigation behavior; LilyGO-style constraints from the visual research are reflected; text fits in 80x24 and narrower fallback layouts; unsupported features have clear terminal-native presentation.
